message:
fix(animation): Use deterministic animation delays for test stability

Replaces Math.random() with deterministic stagger calculation for
particle animation delays in the synergy diagram:

Before: delay: Math.random() * 2
After:  delay: (index * 0.2) % 2

This change provides several benefits:
- Consistent visual appearance across page loads
- Eliminates flaky snapshot tests caused by random values
- Maintains organic "staggered start" effect via index-based offset
- The modulo 2 ensures delays stay within the 0-2 second range

The visual result is nearly identical - particles still start at
different times creating an organic feel - but the timing is now
reproducible and testable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
